project: 仙剑奇侠传现代重制版
description: 仙剑奇侠传1995年原版的现代重制版，保持原版经典剧情和回合制战斗核心，使用Web技术重新设计画面和UI，采用现代扁平化卡通风格。

userStories.title: 项目架构搭建
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to set up the project structure so that development can proceed efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: 创建项目目录结构（src/core, src/scenes, src/systems, src/entities, src/data）
开发服务器可启动运行
userStories.notes: Completed - all acceptance criteria met

userStories.title: 游戏主控制器实现
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a main game controller to manage the game lifecycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Game.ts实现游戏初始化和生命周期管理
userStories.notes: Completed - all acceptance criteria met

userStories.title: 启动场景和主菜单
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see a title screen and menu so I can start or continue the game.
acceptanceCriteria: BootScene.ts加载游戏资源并显示进度
MainMenuScene.ts显示标题和菜单选项（新游戏、继续、设置）
菜单选项可通过键盘/点击选择
中文标题'仙剑奇侠传'正确显示
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - BootScene loads assets with progress bar, MainMenuScene displays Chinese title with 3 menu options navigable via keyboard (arrows/WASD) and mouse click

userStories.title: 地图探索场景实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to explore maps so I can move around towns and dungeons.
acceptanceCriteria: WorldScene.ts实现基于瓦片的地图渲染
玩家角色可在地图上四方向行走
碰撞检测阻止进入障碍区域
地图切换点可传送至其他地图
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - WorldScene implements tile-based map rendering with collision detection, player movement with arrow keys/WASD, map transition points, and NPC interaction with simple dialog display

userStories.title: 对话系统实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to engage in dialogues so I can experience the story.
acceptanceCriteria: 显示说话者名字、头像、对话内容
支持表情切换（normal, happy, sad等）
选项对话支持玩家选择
对话可触发事件（获得物品、进入战斗等）
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - DialogScene implements full dialog interface with speaker name/avatar, typewriter text effect, expression system (normal, happy, sad, angry, surprised, thinking, shy), player choices via keyboard/mouse, and event triggering (items, flags, battles, map changes, healing, party members)

userStories.title: 回合制战斗系统实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to engage in turn-based combat so I can defeat enemies.
acceptanceCriteria: 显示玩家队伍（最多4人）和敌人
玩家可选行动：攻击、仙术、道具、防御、逃跑
按速度值决定行动顺序
正确计算伤害（物理/仙术）
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - BattleScene with full turn-based combat system: displays player party (up to 4) and enemies with HP/MP bars, player actions (attack/skill/item(defend/flee), turn order calculated by speed value, damage calculation for physical and skill attacks, victory/failure判定 with rewards, Chinese-style UI with gold borders, demo skills for testing (御剑术/火咒/五气朝元), status effect system (poison/paralyze/sleep/silence/protect/haste/regen)

userStories.title: 战斗UI界面
userStories.description: As a player, I want clear battle UI so I can easily control my characters.
acceptanceCriteria: 行动按钮清晰可见且可点击
仙术选择菜单列出可用技能
敌人选择界面（单体/全体）
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - Enhanced battle UI with: HP/MP status bars with color indicators (green/yellow/red), action buttons (Attack/Skill/Item/Defend/Flee) with keyboard (↑↓/WS) and mouse click support, skill menu showing available skills with target type indicator (单体/全体/自身), target selection UI for single and all-enemy modes (T key toggle), battle message display area, improved keyboard navigation with debounce, demo skills updated with 玄冰咒 (all-target), executeMultiAttack method added for multi-target physical attacks

userStories.title: 角色数据系统
userStories.description: As a developer, I need character data structures so the game can manage player and enemy stats.
acceptanceCriteria: Character接口定义完整属性（HP, MP, 攻击, 防御, 速度, 运气）
仙术列表和学习等级配置
装备槽位（武器、防具、饰品）
userStories.notes: Completed - Character interface with complete attributes, growth coefficients, skill learning system, equipment slots (weapon/armor/accessory), CharacterManager class for character creation/leveling, characters.json with four main characters (李逍遥/赵灵儿/林月如/阿奴), updated BattleSystem to use character's availableSkills

userStories.title: 李逍遥角色实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want the main character Li Xiaoyao so I can start the game.
acceptanceCriteria: 李逍遥初始属性正确（HP120, MP30, 攻击18, 防御12）
学习御剑术（Lv1）、天师符法（Lv5）等仙术
行走精灵图四方向动画
userStories.notes: Completed - Character data verified in characters.json/skills.json (US-008), SpriteGenerator creates placeholder sprite sheets with 4-direction walk animations (4 frames per direction), PortraitGenerator creates expression portraits for dialogs (normal/happy/sad/angry/surprised/thinking/shy), Player.ts updated to use walking animations, DialogScene integrates portrait system with fallback for NPCs

userStories.title: 赵灵儿角色实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want Zhao Ling'er as a party member with her unique skills.
acceptanceCriteria: 赵灵儿加入时属性正确（HP80, MP80高灵力）
风咒、雷咒等攻击仙术学习等级配置
userStories.notes: Completed - Character data verified in characters.json (HP80, MP80, Attack10, Defense8, Speed12, Luck15), skills in skills.json (风咒Lv1/雷咒Lv5/五气朝元Lv8/冰咒Lv12/火咒Lv15/女娲神珠Lv20/天雷破Lv25/地火烈Lv30), SpriteGenerator/PortraitGenerator generate sprites and portraits for zhao_linger in BootScene

userStories.title: 林月如角色实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want Lin Yue Ru as a physical attack specialist.
acceptanceCriteria: 林月如Lv8加入时属性正确（高攻击）
苏州比武招亲剧情触发加入
userStories.notes: Completed - Character data verified in characters.json (HP100, MP40, Attack22, Defense14, Speed18, Luck10), skills in skills.json (七诀剑气Lv8/剑舞乾坤Lv12/一剑消Lv18/乾坤一掷Lv22/天外飞仙Lv28/剑奴昭日诀Lv35), SpriteGenerator/PortraitGenerator generate sprites and portraits for lin_yueru, story trigger will be implemented in later story

userStories.title: 阿奴角色实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want A Nu as a support character with unique Miao skills.
acceptanceCriteria: 阿奴Lv15加入时属性正确（高速度、高运气）
鬼降、祭天等辅助/减益仙术
userStories.notes: Completed - Character data verified in characters.json (HP70, MP60, Attack12, Defense6, Speed22, Luck18), skills in skills.json (鬼降Lv15/祭天Lv18/苗剑Lv22/万毒咒Lv25/羲和烈Lv30/银河咒Lv35), SpriteGenerator/PortraitGenerator generate sprites and portraits for anu, story trigger will be implemented in later story

userStories.title: 仙术/技能系统
userStories.description: As a player, I want to use skills in battle so I can deal more damage or heal.
acceptanceCriteria: Skill接口定义完整（名称、MP消耗、威力、属性、目标类型）
攻击仙术：御剑术、冰咒、雷咒、火咒、风咒等
恢复仙术：五气朝元、玄冰咒等
userStories.notes: Completed - Skill interface enhanced with statusEffect and healing fields, skills.json with 26 skills across all four characters (李逍遥: 御剑术/天师符法/万剑诀/七星诀 etc., 赵灵儿: 风咒/雷咒/五气朝元/女娲神珠 etc., 林月如: 七诀剑气/剑舞乾坤/天外飞仙 etc., 阿奴: 鬼降/祭天/万毒咒 etc.), BattleScene has skill animations (caster glow, target flash)

userStories.title: 物品系统实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to use items so I can heal or equip better gear.
acceptanceCriteria: Item接口定义类型（消耗品、武器、防具、饰品、剧情道具）
消耗品效果配置（止血草HP+50等）
物品可在战斗/菜单中使用
userStories.notes: Completed - ItemType (consumable/weapon/armor/accessory/key), ItemEffect interface for consumables (hp/mp/status effects), EquipmentBonus for attribute bonuses, ItemManager class with applyEffect/calculateEquipmentBonus methods, items.json with 12 consumables (止血草/金创药/灵心丹 etc.), 9 weapons (木剑/铁剑/灵剑/天师剑 etc.), 7 armors (布衣/铁甲/青铜甲 etc.), 5 accessories (木戒指/银戒指/女娲玉佩 etc.), 4 key items (客栈钥匙/仙灵岛通行证 etc.), usableInBattle/usableInMenu flags for consumables

userStories.title: 物品/装备管理界面
userStories.description: As a player, I want to manage my inventory so I can use items and equip gear.
acceptanceCriteria: 消耗品可使用并显示效果
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - InventoryScene with category filtering (all/consumable/weapon/armor/accessory/key), item list with selection, detail panel showing name/type/description/price/effects/bonuses, character selection panel with HP/MP bars, use/equip/sort/close buttons, keyboard navigation (arrows/WASD for items, A/D for characters, Enter/Space to use, ESC to close), consumable usage applies effects to selected character, equipment toggle for equip/unequip

userStories.title: 存档系统实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to save my progress so I can continue later.
acceptanceCriteria: SaveData接口定义完整存档内容
保存当前地图、位置、剧情进度
userStories.notes: Completed - SaveData interface with all fields (slotId, timestamp, playTime, currentMap, playerPosition, storyFlags, currentChapter, partyMembers, characters, inventory, gold, affection, settings), SaveSystem class with save/load/delete methods, 5 save slots (1-5), localStorage persistence, SaveSlotInfo for UI display, GameSettings interface, quickSave/quickLoad for auto-save, formatPlayTime/formatTimestamp helpers

userStories.title: 存档/读档界面
userStories.description: As a player, I want to select save slots so I can manage multiple playthroughs.
acceptanceCriteria: 显示5个存档槽位及信息（时间、进度）
已有槽位可读取或覆盖
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - SaveLoadScene with 5 save slots, each slot shows: slot number, play time, chapter, save timestamp, current location, thumbnail placeholder; empty slots show '-- 空 --'; mode toggle (save/load); action buttons (保存/读取, 删除, 关闭); keyboard navigation (↑↓/WS for slots, Enter/Space to confirm, ESC to close); success/error messages with colored feedback; integrates with SaveSystem for localStorage operations

userStories.title: 商店系统实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to buy/sell items so I can prepare for battles.
acceptanceCriteria: 显示商店物品列表和价格
userStories.notes: Completed - ShopSystem.ts with buy/sell logic, ShopTransaction interface for result, ShopData interface for shop configuration, ShopEntry for inventory, buyItem/sellItem methods with validation (shop exists, item exists, stock check, gold check, inventory check), getShopDisplayInfo for UI, shop.json with 8 shops (yuhang_town: 杂货铺/药铺/铁匠铺, suzhou_city: 杂货铺/林家兵器店/药铺, miao_village: 苗寨杂货铺/兵器店, special: 灵宝阁), buysItems/buyCategories for item acceptance filtering

userStories.title: 商店界面
userStories.description: As a player, I want a clear shop interface so I can easily buy items.
acceptanceCriteria: 物品名称、价格、数量清晰显示
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - ShopScene with buy/sell mode toggle, item list showing name/price/stock (for buy) or name/sell price/quantity (for sell), detail panel with item info (name/type/description/prices/effects/bonuses), quantity selector with +/-/MAX buttons, confirm/cancel buttons, keyboard navigation (arrows/WASD for items, A/D for quantity, Enter/Space to confirm, ESC to close), gold display updated after transactions, success/error messages

userStories.title: 旅馆系统实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to rest at inns so I can fully recover HP/MP.
userStories.notes: Completed - InnSystem.ts with rest functionality, InnData interface for inn configuration, InnResult interface for rest result, rest() method with HP/MP recovery, status effect removal, gold deduction, auto-save via SaveSystem.quickSave(), DEFAULT_INNS with 4 inns (余杭客栈/苏州客栈/苗寨客栈/仙灵岛客栈), canAfford/getInnPrice helper methods

userStories.title: 状态效果系统
userStories.description: As a player, I want status effects to affect combat so battles are more strategic.
acceptanceCriteria: 负面状态：中毒、眩晕、睡眠、沉默等
正面状态：防护、神行、回春等
状态解除物品/仙术可用
userStories.notes: Completed - StatusType enum with 7 effects (poison/paralyze/sleep/silence/protect/haste/regen), status effect icons displayed in BattleScene (毒/晕/眠/默/护/速/愈), duration management in BattleSystem.processStatusEffects, skills apply status effects on hit (e.g., 鬼降 applies paralyze, 万毒咒 applies poison), items remove status effects (解毒药/jieduyao removes poison, 醒神丹/xingshendan removes sleep/paralyze), damage over time for poison, regeneration for regen, speed bonus for haste, damage reduction for protect

userStories.title: 经验值与升级系统
userStories.description: As a player, I want to level up so my characters become stronger.
acceptanceCriteria: 战斗胜利获得经验值和金钱
累计经验值达到阈值触发升级
升级时属性按成长系数提升
达到特定等级学会新仙术
userStories.notes: Completed - BattleResult includes expReward/goldReward/itemsReward/levelUps, LevelUpResult interface tracks character level-ups with new skills, BattleSystem.checkBattleEnd calculates EXP/gold rewards, CharacterManager.levelUp handles stat growth and skill learning, CharacterManager.addExp detects level-ups and returns new skills, BattleScene shows victory message with level-up notifications, EXP formula: (level-1)^2 * 100, stats = base + (level-1) * growth

userStories.title: 战斗掉落系统
userStories.description: As a player, I want rewards after battles so I can gain items.
userStories.notes: Completed - BattleReward interface (exp, gold, items, guaranteedItems), ItemDrop interface (itemId, probability, quantity range), BattleRewardResult interface for calculated rewards, EnemyDropTable for enemy-specific drops, BattleRewardSystem with calculateEnemyReward/calculateTotalReward methods, rollDrop for probability-based drops, DEFAULT_DROP_TABLES with 6 enemy types (slime/wolf/bandit/demon/boss_bandit_leader/boss_demon_king), probability 0-1 for drop chance, quantity min/max for variable amounts

userStories.title: 宝箱系统
userStories.description: As a player, I want to find treasure chests so I can get rewards.
userStories.notes: Completed - TreasureBox interface with position (mapId, x, y) and contents, TreasureContent interface (itemId, quantity, gold, exp, skillId), TreasureResult interface for open results, TreasureSystem class with openTreasure/canOpen/isOpened methods, openedChests Set for state tracking, requireItem/requireFlag for conditional access, DEMO_TREASURES with 5 demo chests across locations (yuhang_town, xianling_island, suzhou_city, miao_village), getVisibleTreasures for filtering hidden/locked chests

userStories.title: 好感度系统实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to build relationships so I can unlock combo skills.
acceptanceCriteria: 好感度等级划分（冷淡/普通/友好/亲密/深爱）
userStories.notes: Completed - AffectionSystem with 0-100 affection range for three characters (zhao_linger, lin_yueru, anu), AffectionLevel enum (冷淡/普通/友好/亲密/深爱), addDialogAffection for dialog choices (good=+5, neutral=+2, bad=-3), addGiftAffection with gift effectiveness table (flower/jewelry/herb/candy/book), GIFT_EFFECTIVENESS per character preferences, COMBO_SKILL_REQUIREMENTS for unlock checking, isComboSkillUnlocked/getUnlockedComboSkills for combo skill gating, getAffectionProgress for UI display

userStories.title: 好感度界面
userStories.description: As a player, I want to view affection levels so I know my progress.
acceptanceCriteria: 显示三人好感度进度条
显示当前等级名称和颜色
显示已解锁/未解锁合体技
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 合体技能系统
userStories.description: As a player, I want combo skills so I can deal powerful attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: 四人合体技：四方合击、女娲神威
双人合体技：剑舞乾坤、仙魔同归
userStories.notes: Completed - ComboSkill interface with participants and affection requirements, ComboSkillSystem class with availability checking, DEFAULT_COMBO_SKILLS with 6 combo skills (剑舞乾坤/仙魔同归/灵神风暴/影刃绝杀/四方合击/女娲神威), BattleSystem.executeComboSkill method for damage calculation and MP consumption, BattleScene combo menu with flashy visual effects (flashy/spectacular/ultimate animation types), affection level requirements integrated with COMBO_SKILL_REQUIREMENTS from AffectionSystem

userStories.title: 地图数据配置
userStories.description: As a developer, I need map data so the game can render locations.
acceptanceCriteria: 多层瓦片支持（地面/建筑/覆盖）
userStories.notes: Completed - Enhanced MapData interface with multi-layer support (LayerType: ground/building/overlay/event), TileType enum expanded (12 tile types), MapEventData with trigger types, MapTransitionData with source coordinates and requirements, CollisionData and CollisionBox structures, MapEnvironment settings, maps.json created with 10 maps across 5 locations (yuhang_town, xianling_island, suzhou_city, miao_village, lingbao_pavilion), WorldScene.ts updated to use new interface

userStories.title: 余杭镇地图实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to explore Yuhang Town so I can start the game.
acceptanceCriteria: 余杭镇地图瓦片渲染正确
李逍遥家、酒馆等关键地点可进入
城镇色调温暖（暖黄、棕色）
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - Implemented MapManager to load maps from maps.json, updated WorldScene to render multi-layer maps with warm color theme (暖黄/棕色), added NPC dialogs for 婶婶 and 醉道士, implemented building/overlay layer rendering with proper collision detection, updated MainMenuScene to start in yuhang_town_main map

userStories.title: 仙灵岛迷宫实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to explore Fairy Island so I can meet Ling'er.
acceptanceCriteria: 神秘氛围色调（青绿、淡蓝）
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - Enhanced xianling_entrance with mystical water pools and fog environment, implemented xianling_maze_1 with maze paths and water obstacles, created xianling_pool with lotus pond where Zhao Ling'er appears, added meet_linger_cutscene dialog with meeting Zhao Ling'er event, updated WorldScene with mystical color theme (青绿 #4ECDC4, 淡蓝 #E0F7FA), added lotus flower tile (9) for overlay layer

userStories.title: 苏州城地图实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to explore Suzhou so I can join the martial arts contest.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - Implemented suzhou_main with bustling city layout (35x25), suzhou_lin_home (林家堡 25x18), suzhou_inn (客栈 20x15), suzhou_arena (比武招亲擂台 20x15). Added 繁华色调 color theme (#C41E3A red, #FFD700 gold). Added NPCs: crowd gossip, guards, shopkeeper, Lin butler, Lin Yueru. Added transitions to all Suzhou locations. Added dialog sequences including arena_biwu_zhaqin cutscene with battle trigger. Updated DialogData.ts with Suzhou dialogs (suzhou_arrive, suzhou_crowd_gossip, arena_biwu_zhaqin, arena_win/lose outcomes).

userStories.title: 锁妖塔实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to explore the Demon Lock Tower so I can save Ling'er.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - Implemented suoyaota location with 7 maps (entrance + 5 levels + bottom). Created enemies.json with tower enemies (ghost/skeleton/demon/gargoyle/shadow/boss_guardian/boss_demon_king). Added puzzle events for each level (switch/torch/key/door mechanisms). Added tower dialogs for entrance warning, puzzle hints, find Ling'er cutscene, Yueru sacrifice cutscene. Implemented压抑色调 color theme with deep purple (#2D1B4E) and black (#0D0D1A) backgrounds.

userStories.title: 苗族地图实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to explore Miao territory so I can collect Spirit Pearls.
acceptanceCriteria: 黑苗族、白苗族城镇地图
异域风情色调（翠绿、紫色）
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - Implemented black_miao_village (4 maps), white_miao_village (4 maps), miao_sacred_grounds (5 maps with maze). Added 5 Spirit Pearls (火灵珠/水灵珠/风灵珠/雷灵珠/土灵珠) as key items in items.json. Applied exotic color theme with 翠绿 (#4CAF50) for White Miao and 紫色 (#9C27B0) for Black Miao. Added 20+ dialog sequences for Miao NPCs and events. All maps have transitions, NPCs, events, and collision data.

userStories.title: 剧情脚本系统
userStories.description: As a developer, I need story scripts so the narrative can be played.
acceptanceCriteria: 剧情事件（对话、战斗、获得物品）
userStories.notes: Completed - StorySystem.ts with StoryNode/StoryTrigger/StoryEvent interfaces, TriggerType enum (enter_map/interact_npc/flag_set/etc), StoryEventType enum (dialog/battle/get_item/set_flag/chapter_change/etc), story.json with 6 chapters and 18 story nodes covering full storyline (序章梦中习剑 -> 第一章仙灵岛 -> 第二章苏州比武招亲 -> 第三章锁妖塔 -> 第四章苗疆 -> 第五章结局), story progress tracking with flags/chapter/completedNodes, trigger condition checking with blockingNodes/requiredFlags/requiredParty, event execution system with waitForCompletion

userStories.title: 第一章剧情实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to play Chapter 1 so I can start the story.
acceptanceCriteria: 酒馆遇醉道士学会御剑术
userStories.notes: Completed - Added dialog sequences for chapter 1 (prologue_dream, ch1_aunt_sick, ch1_drunkard_teach, ch1_enter_xianling, ch1_maze_intro, ch1_baiyue_attack, ch1_linger_captured), integrated StorySystem with WorldScene for trigger checking on map entry and NPC interaction, added executeStoryNode/executeStoryEvent methods for story event handling, added parseStoryConfig helper to parse JSON story data, added getNPCId() method to NPC class

userStories.title: 第二章剧情实现
userStories.description: As a player, I want to play Chapter 2 so I can meet Lin Yue Ru.
userStories.notes: Completed - Story nodes for chapter 2 already existed (story_ch2_arrive_suzhou, story_ch2_biwu). Added lin_yueru_boss enemy to enemies.json with boss-level stats (HP350, Attack35). Fixed WorldScene BATTLE event handling to properly construct BattleConfig with enemy data from EnemyManager and player party from CharacterManager. Added loadSkillsFromJson helper to Skill.ts. Chapter 2 story flow: arrive in Suzhou -> enter arena -> dialog with Lin Yueru -> boss battle -> victory -> Lin Yueru joins party.

userStories.title: 锁妖塔月如牺牲剧情
userStories.description: As a player, I want to experience the tragic sacrifice scene.
acceptanceCriteria: 月如牺牲对话序列播放
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed - Enhanced story_ch3_yueru_sacrifice node with multi-step screen effects (shake/flash/fade), tower_yueru_sacrifice_cutscene dialog with sacrifice scene, tower_yueru_sacrifice_aftermath dialog showing aftermath with grief and resolve, REMOVE_PARTY event removes lin_yueru, GET_ITEM event gives yueru_relic key item, SCREEN_EFFECT event handler added to WorldScene.ts (shake/flash/fade with color support)
